name: Vegetarian Chunky Chili
directions: Heat the oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add onion, bell peppers and garlic.
Saute 5 minutes or until tender.
Add sugar and remaining ingredients.
Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
Makes 8x1-cup servings.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Black-Eyed Pea Patties With Garlic Pepper Salsa

name: Quick Italian Sausage Soup
directions: In a 5-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat, cook sausage slices until lightly browned on the outside and no longer pink inside when slashed.
Remove from Dutch oven with a slotted spoon, drain on paper towels and set aside.
Spoon off and discard all but 3 tablespoons drippings.
Add garlic and onions and cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are soft (about 5 minutes).
Stir in tomatoes (break up with a spoon) and their liquid; then add sausage slices, broth, wine, and basil.
Bring to a full rolling boil; cover reduce heat, and simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in parsley, green pepper, zucchini, and noodles.
Cover and simmer, stirring occasionally, until noodles are al dente (about 25 minutes).
Skim off and discard fat.
Pass cheese at the table to spoon over individual servings.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Winter Time Treats for Birds
directions: Slice each bun in half, or whatever bread item you are using.I normally use a small cookie cutter to cut out center so I can hang with ribbon --
Beat egg whites till frothy with wire whisk.
I use a clean cheap paintbrush to brush egg whites over surface of each bread item.
I place my birdseed on a flat surface, sometimes I use a 9x13 pan.
I dip buns coated with egg white in birdseed.
then place buns on cookie sheet.
Bake at 350* for 10 minutes.
Let cool then hang with jute of colored ribbon or yarn on tree branches.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Jody's Black Bean Chili
directions: Dice onion into small pieces and sauté in oil over medium heat until translucent, then add minced garlic and sauté another couple of minutes.
Transfer onion and garlic into large soup pot.
Cook ground beef thoroughly, drain and add to pot. Add all remaining ingredients, but do NOT drain beans or tomatoes, put all the liquid from the cans into the chili.
Bring to a boil, then simmer on low to medium low for an hour, stirring occasionally.
Serve with shredded sharp cheese, a dollop of sour cream and plain Fritos corn chips.

similar.name: Black-Eyed Pea Patties With Garlic Pepper Salsa
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Mulligatawny Soup
directions: Combine all ingredients in a stock pot, and bring to a boil.
Let slow boil for 45 minutes then reduce heat to allow soup to simmer.
Cook until vegetables are tender.
Simmer on low for about an hour before serving.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Jackson Family Turkey Stuffing
directions: Have the chopped onion and celery ready.
Melt the cube of butter in a pot.
Add the chopped onion and celery.
Add chicken broth to liberally cover and cook until the broth has intensified.
Carefully toast the pecans in the microwave until you can scent them.
In your largest bowl place both stuffing mixes, chopped parsley, chopped herbs,raw mushrooms and pecans.
Toss together.
Add the hot broth, onions, and celery from the stove.
Mix and taste for seasoning.
Adding salt and pepper as needed.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Black-Eyed Pea Patties With Garlic Pepper Salsa
directions: Combine minced garlic and chiles in a large bowl. Place 1 teaspoon garlic mixture in a small bowl; set aside. Add peas to remaining garlic mixture in large bowl; mash mixture with a potato masher. Stir in bell pepper, 1/4 cup chopped fresh cilantro, cumin, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and egg, stirring until well blended.
Divide mixture into 12 equal portions (about 1/4 cup each), shaping each into a 1/2-inch-thick patty.

Heat 1 1/2 teaspoons olive oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add 6 patties; cook 4 minutes on each side or until browned. Repeat procedure with the remaining 1 1/2 teaspoons olive oil and 6 patties.
Add remaining 2 tablespoons chopped fresh cilantro, remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt, chopped tomato, and fresh lime juice to the reserved garlic mixture in bowl; stir well. Serve with patties.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Sour Cream Cranberry Jello
directions: Mix jellied cranberry sauce and 1 cup hot water in blender util liquid and smooth.
Dissolve both boxes of jello in 1 cup hot water.
Add cranberry mixture to jello mixture, add pecans.
Pour half the mixture in a container and put in freezer until it is firm.
Add half of sour cream to this mixture and add the rest of jello mixture.
Add rest of sour cream and chill.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Classic Cornbread Dressing
directions: Preheat oven at 350.
Mix all ingredients together and add broth until the mixture is soupy.
Grease a 9x12 pan and pour mixture into the pan.
Bake for atleast an hour, check to see if its done. It's best with a good crispy top, so be sure not to cover the pan!

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Winter Pasta
directions: Heat large saute pan over medium heat. Add olive oil, onion, and garlic. Saute 3-4 minutes.
Add tomatoes, artichokes. Saute an additional 2 minutes until heated through.
Toss with cooked pasta and top with parmesan.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Becky's Wild Rice Soup
directions: In a large stockpot, melt butter.
Add celery, carrots, onion & garlic.  Saute.
Stir in chicken broth, cream of chicken & cream of mushroom soup.
Sprinkle in parsley, oregano & pepper.
Add wild rice and sliced almonds.
Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, simmer for 20 minutes.
Add milk and simmer for another 20 minutes.
Stir occasionally, to prevent rice from sticking to the pot.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Easy Chili :)
directions: In a large saucepan over medium heat, cook beef and onion until the meat is no longer pink; drain. Add the remaining ingredients. Bring to a boil; reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 30 minutes.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings
directions: Put broth, vegetables and pepper in soup pot.  Bring to boil at medium high heat.  Turn heat to low, cover and cook for 5 minutes.  Add chicken meat.
While the broth is cooking, mix the milk and biscuit mix in a medium bowl.  Stir to combine.
Spoon the dough in 12 mounds on top of the hot broth mixture.  Cover and cook about 10 minutes more or until a toothpick inserted into dumplings comes out clean.

similar.name: Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas

name: Barley Stew With Saffron and Chickpeas
directions: In a saucepan, soften the onion, bell pepper, and garlic in the oil with the paprika and saffron. Season with salt and pepper.
Add the barley, chickpeas, and broth and bring to a boil. Cover and simmer gently, stirring frequently, for about 50 minutes or until the broth has been absorbed and the barley is tender.
Add the tomatoes and peas. Continue cooking, stirring frequently, for 3 to 4 minutes. Adjust the seasoning.

similar.name: Snow Day Soup - Chicken Vegetable and Dumplings

name: Reindeer Dust Recipe
directions: Mix together all ingredients.
Scoop 2 Tablespoons of mixture into a small cellophane bag.
Fasten bag with a ribbon, baker's twine or washi tape.
Sprinkle the Reindeer Dust on Christmas Eve.
You are now done and ready to share the reindeer fun!
